rewritten_requirements: The system shall collect user history or activities.
The system shall process the collected data.
The system shall create a dataset for suggesting videos.
The system shall load suggested videos based on user preference and taste.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system begins with the collection of the history or activities of the users

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Load suggested videos based on user preference and taste
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: it loads videos based on the dataset
